{{Infobox character
| name = Pilgrim
| appears_in = The Elder Empire: Sea, The Elder Empire: Shadow
| titles = Knight-Adjunct
| abilities = incantation, alchemy, medical skill, Soulbound power
| affiliations = Luminian Order, the Guild
| introduced = Of Dawn and Darkness
}}

''See also: [[Pilgrim Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Pilgrims]] are members of the [[Luminian Order]], a disciplined organization characterized by its silver-armored knights and practitioners who wear pristine white clothing. They are easily identified by the silver [[White Sun]] medallions they carry on their chests, which serve as symbols of their order. These individuals are intended to act as beacons of protective and restorative light, though their specific abilities vary due to the [[Awakening]] process. While some can create barriers of light, others possess healing capabilities, and some develop an intense religious fervor regarding the destruction of [[Elderspawn]]. To reach the highest ranks and gain [[Soulbound]] status, [[Pilgrims]] must undergo years of service to the [[Guild]], combat various [[Elders]], and demonstrate proficiency in traditional medical and alchemical healing. The most powerful among them possess a healing [[Beacon]], a status not held by all members. The order is led by a [[Guild Head]], [[Jameson Allbright]], who distinguishes himself from the rank-and-file through colorful ceremonial attire. Historically, the role is rooted in the legacy of [[Loreli]], Daughter of [[the Emperor]], who was considered the first Pilgrim and a multifaceted icon of healing and warfare.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|A [[Pilgrim]] is a type of person that can be taken into custody.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Andel]] is a [[Pilgrim]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c19">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Pilgrims]] recite an incantation when they suspect a spawn of the [[Creeping Shadow]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c6">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Pilgrim]] is a man in white robes who carries a copy of [[Meditations on the Unknown God]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Pilgrim]] wears a [[White Sun medallion]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Pilgrim]] addresses [[Darius]] as [[Knight-Adjunct]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c6" />}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Foster]] called for a [[Pilgrim]] he could trust.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Pilgrims]] of the [[Luminian Order]] must serve the [[Guild]] for years, oppose [[Elders]], and heal people with [[alchemy]] and medical skill to possess [[Soulbound]] power.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17" />}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] orders the Reader to be taken to a [[Pilgrim]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|“I called for a Pilgrim who can be trusted,” Foster said, not noticing the death glares he immediately got from the Champions down the hall.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Soulbound]]
